scripts.dev: npx concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend/ai-habit-tracker-ui-boilerplate-code && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend/ai-habit-tracker-ui-boilerplate-code && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend/ai-habit-tracker-ui-boilerplate-code && npm install
